candidate.current_state: Looking-Glass extension treated as release-blocking by the CI gate
candidate.inferred_cause: Misread of the v0.1 doc where research-only status was implicit
candidate.proposed_state: Looking-Glass extension reclassified as research-only; CI gate no longer requires its pass

claims.text: Looking-Glass extension status is research-only per 04_extensions/looking_glass.md
The current CI gate condition is a misclassification, not an explicit policy

risks: Downstream proxy gate scripts may already assume Looking-Glass is required

steps: git revert the gate condition change
Rerun check_repo.ps1 to confirm pre-change behaviour
rollback_plan.estimated_cost: low: one commit revert + one CI run

reasons: Rollback plan covers the single modified line
Verifier reports pass with covering reasons
No anchor conflicts; affected anchor marked compatible
Rollback plan covers reversible single-line change

notes: Worked example covering a pass verdict on a reversible code change with three evidence kinds, a verifier pass, no anchor conflicts, and an audit_log_ref.
